item.title: What Will It Take For USA To Win 2026 World Cup? 'High Capability Of Suffering'
item.description: The former coaches of the United States men's national team map out the path to success at the 2026 FIFA World Cup.

item.description: NFL Draft betting odds are shaping the top 10. Here’s how the board could fall if each team selects the current favorite at their respective pick.
